title: The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time
edition_pinned: Row describes the 1998 N64 design; genre evidence from archived Ocarina of Time 3D product page (data-genre Action), observed 2026-07-13.
moat: Child/adult time split and context items rewrite the same map into two interlocking quest graphs.
scope_efficiency_hypothesis: One world state machine plus reusable item tools supports dungeons, overworld, and time puzzles.
exemplar_rationale: Shows hybrid adventure depth from time-linked world states and Z-targeting combat.

evidence.claim: Archived Nintendo 3DS product page for Ocarina of Time 3D listed data-genre as: Action.
